response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the video and identified 14 musical tracks presented as a medley. 2. Created 15 scenes (1 intro, 14 song segments, 1 outro). 3. Used on-screen text to identify song titles, performers, and guest artists. 4. Conducted web searches for lyrics for each track. 5. Compiled the data into the required JSON format. For songs where explicit lyric snippets were not found in the initial search, the field is marked null.
response.global_summary: This video is a teaser/promotional medley for the album 'Disasterpiece' by Mori Calliope, featuring snippets of 14 different songs. Each segment highlights a specific track, which is identified by on-screen text. The video features various visual styles synchronized to each musical track.

scenes.description: Introductory logo and title for the album 'Disasterpiece'.
Track 2: 'Let's Just Crash'. The visual features a dynamic, glitchy presentation.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
You got eyes and ears, but you don’t look or listen!
In other words, you’re useless.
Every last one of ya!
And that’s why I’m gonna send you all to hell.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
You got eyes and ears, but you don’t look or listen!
In other words, you’re useless.
Every last one of ya!
And that’s why I’m gonna send you all to hell.

scenes.description: Track 3: 'Gold Unbalance feat. 中島健人'. Visuals show a dance performance.
scenes.song_title: Gold Unbalance feat. 中島健人

scenes.description: Track 4: 'Die For You'. Darker atmosphere with close-up shots.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
We fall, we break, we drown in fire
Lost inside in this dark desire
No love, no faith, just you and I
Dancing till the end of time
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
We fall, we break, we drown in fire
Lost inside in this dark desire
No love, no faith, just you and I
Dancing till the end of time

scenes.description: Track 5: '天誅 & Mercy feat. 10-FEET'. High energy performance.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Sorrow 孵化する未来のmercy (mercy)
微動だにしない異彩の愛に (愛に)
焦げ付くほどのhold you抱擁と
Hello, Hello, 今宵のday dreamer, let’s maintain

scenes.description: Track 6: 'Ningen Dakara'. Visuals show a more subdued, atmospheric stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
偽物だ！って (oh)
Tell me what I’m to, “not say” (woah, oh)
What’s your problem? 夜を一人
あたしが迷う

scenes.description: Track 7: 'Rivals and Equals'. Dynamic camera angles and lighting.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
When thunder crashes down
When the world caves under my pressure
There’ll be no one to save
Where is your pride, your human will to survive?
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
When thunder crashes down
When the world caves under my pressure
There’ll be no one to save
Where is your pride, your human will to survive?

scenes.description: Track 8: 'INSOMNIAC BLACK'. Atmospheric, neon-lit visual style.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: I’m reaching out to the me that I used to be\nKnow it’s all about the side that you choose to free\nLet loose and decide on the star you’re meant to see
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: I’m reaching out to the me that I used to be\nKnow it’s all about the side that you choose to free\nLet loose and decide on the star you’re meant to see

scenes.description: Track 9: 'Shuuden'. Visuals show a city setting at night.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: I’m waiting for a train that never comes\nThe station floor is lined with scattered pictures\nOf places I thought that I would go
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: I’m waiting for a train that never comes\nThe station floor is lined with scattered pictures\nOf places I thought that I would go

scenes.description: Track 10: 'Memento'. Visuals feature emotive, cinematic shots.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
So just how far could I go
I think I already know
That view that I wanna see
A place in history that’s mine
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
So just how far could I go
I think I already know
That view that I wanna see
A place in history that’s mine

scenes.description: Track 11: 'FLASH BANG feat. PES'. Intense, rhythmic visuals.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 暗くなる頃始まるパーティー 集まる人種は錚々\n明日なき夜にダークな遊び that’s my design さあ創造
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: As darkness falls, the party begins, gathering a distinguished crowd.\nIn this night without a tomorrow, we play in shadows—that’s my design, so let’s create.

scenes.description: Track 12: 'Seeing Stars feat. Lotus Juice'. Upbeat and driving visual style.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Don’t look back, look forward
Find something you can move toward
Don’t look back, look forward
Don’t look back
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Don’t look back, look forward
Find something you can move toward
Don’t look back, look forward
Don’t look back

scenes.description: Track 13: 'Sepia feat. TOOBOE'. Visuals feature warmer colors and a nostalgic vibe.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 誤解すんなよ こんな滑稽な\nサッと過ぎ去る毎日(エブリデイ)\nAnother prisoner of fate no one could fake out
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Don’t misunderstand, it’s laughable\nHow time flashes by every day\nAnother prisoner of fate no one could fake out

scenes.description: Track 14: 'Die For You feat. ARTMS'. A remix version of Track 4.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
We fall, we break, we drown in fire
Lost inside in this dark desire
No love, no faith, just you and I
Dancing till the end of time
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
